title: Create: Better Motors
description: Create: Better Motors introduces 7 powerful, fully configurable motors that convert Forge Energy (FE) into Stress Units (SU). It also features a high-output alternator generating 452 FE/t using SU, perfect for energy-intensive setups.
body:
THANKS TO OUR SPONSORS

THANKS TO ZAP-HOSTING! Use code Reggarf-1047 for 20% off any order!

https://zap-hosting.com/reggarf

Create: Better Motors

Supercharge your Minecraft world with Create: Better Motors! This mod introduces 7 powerful motors that seamlessly convert Forge Energy (FE) into Stress Units (SU), bringing new possibilities to your machinery setups.

Key Features:

  • Efficient Motors: Transform FE into SU with 7 specialized motors designed for optimized performance.
  • High-Output Alternator: Generate up to 452 FE/t by supplying SU, perfect for energy-intensive setups.
  • Fully Configurable: Tailor the motors and alternator to suit your needs with customizable settings, ensuring compatibility with any build or playstyle.
  • Reggarfonite Ore: found between Y-levels -64 and 64

 

📜 Credits

This mod includes code and features inspired by the following mods:

Create: New Age by nullBlade : https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-new-age

Create Utilities by duquee___ : https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/createutilities

Huge thanks to the creators of these mods for their contributions to the Create Mod community! If you enjoy my mod, consider checking out their amazing work as well.
